view)"}},"notice":"HexChain v5 \u2014 \uc18c\uc218\uc790 \uac8c\uc784 \u00d7 Keeper \ucee4\ubc0b-\ub9ac\ube4c \u00d7 \ub208\uce58\uac8c\uc784 \uad6c\uc870:   - commit()      : commitHash\ub97c Poseidon(choices, salt) \uac12\uc73c\ub85c \ucee4\ubc0b   - revealFor()   : keeper\uac00 Groth16 proof\ub97c \uac80\uc99d\ud55c \ub4a4 pickedMask \uc628\uccb4\uc778 \ubc18\uc601   - eyeReveal()   : \uc720\uc800\uac00 \uc9c1\uc811 order+salt \uacf5\uac1c (plain keccak256 \uac80\uc99d)   - eyeRevealFor(): keeper\uac00 \uc720\uc800 \ub300\uc2e0 order+salt \uacf5\uac1c (API \uc218\uc2e0 \ud6c4 \ub300\ub9ac)   - survivingMask: nibble-value \ube44\ud2b8\ub9c8\uc2a4\ud06c (bit k = nibble k \uc0dd\uc874) \ud750\ub984:   1. createRound()                                       \u2014 \ub77c\uc6b4\ub4dc \uc0dd\uc131   2. commit(roundId, commitHash)                         \u2014 4\ud53d \ucee4\ubc0b (Poseidon)   3. lockRound(roundId)                                  \u2014 \ube14\ub85d \ud574\uc2dc \ud655\uc815 (LOCKED)   4. revealFor(roundId, player, pA, pB, pC, pubSignals) \u2014 keeper ZK proof \uac80\uc99d   5. openEyeGame(roundId)                                \u2014 \ub208\uce58\uac8c\uc784 \uc2dc\uc791 (EYE_OPEN)   6. eyeCommit(roundId, eyeCommitHash)                   \u2014 \ub208\uce58 \uc21c\uc11c \ucee4\ubc0b (keccak256)   7. lockEyeRound(roundId)                               \u2014 \ub208\uce58\uac8c\uc784 \ub77d (EYE_LOCKED)   8. eyeRevealFor(roundId, player, order, salt)          \u2014 keeper \ub300\ub9ac \uacf5\uac1c      \ub610\ub294 eyeReveal(roundId, order, salt)                \u2014 \uc720\uc800 \uc9c1\uc811 \uacf5\uac1c   9. settle(roundId)                                     \u2014 \ucd5c\uc885 \uc810\uc218 + \uc0c1\uae08 \ubd84\ubc30","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/HexChain.sol":"HexChain"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/HexChain.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf6f035e4ddb998756a5be7d0b2595a33d525733c400e06fff8ba596d629e6d3b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c752b816470c1d973cd99127925fad2552cd63e9f17851267f527198277217c3","dweb:/ipfs/Qma5ZHExrpmm37BCwdNu5rasErkLTyxzuX9cV1zidZ324j"]},"contracts/RevealVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7c9cf0b551033faefe5c52670f9f3936ca9b2073a08668820c0e605f89db3cfa","license":"GPL-3.0","urls":["bzz-raw://f1fdbabb160b8ec2b9248210d41b609808818adde7325b348c4f916cdf843046","dweb:/ipfs/QmYDoxXX69QJhAXKXyuWwsiSMPNxZuksQFuen3EjdBkyje"]}},"version":1}

currentRoundId().notice: 마지막으로 생성된 라운드 ID (멀티룸에서는 Registry의 getOpenRounds() 사용 권장)

getOneSurvivingPick(uint256,address).notice: C3 — 상대 생존 픽 중 최고배율 nibble 열람. 미공개, 전멸 시 type(uint8).max 반환.

getOverlappingNibbles(uint256).notice: C1 — 전체 플레이어 겹친 nibble 비트마스크 반환.

getSurvivingCount(uint256,address).notice: C2 — 상대 생존 픽 수 열람. 미공개 시 type(uint8).max 반환.

revealFor(uint256,address,uint256[2],uin.notice: 자기 자신은 누구나 호출 가능. 타인 대리는 operator만.

wasLastInPrevRound(uint256,address).notice: D2 — 직전 라운드 꼴찌 여부 (프론트엔드용 view)
